romanized_sourashtra: Thumi sauriyam ya? / Sauriyam ya / Tumi kono se? / Tumi kiso se
Aski thenu sauriyam ya? / Aski thenu chokad se ya?
Tumre naav kaayi? / Thumro naav kaai?
Yenu morey amma / Yenu morey maa
Thumi kot rehoso? / Thumi kot rhaanu
Thume kai khereryuh? / Thu kayi kheroraasi?
Me khush se / Mogo Khushi horisi
